title: chenopodium berlandieri
intro: Chenopodium berlandieri, also known as the pitseed goosefoot, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium berlandieri can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
